summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of BatchDetail.js redesign (iteration 140). All 14 features verified successfully: two-column layout, pH inline badge, readable text-lg numbers, summary row, quality bar, monochrome stage headers, pass/reject percentages, quality micro-bars, rejection panel with breakdowns, detail view with filters, activity log, inspection form, move/receive form, and warehouse transfer section.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test batches: 660G-APR-001 (pH 8.5, 222 rejected, rich data), TEST-FIX-001 (pH 7.5, 8 pending at Stage 2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BatchDetail.js redesign v2 complete. All features working correctly. Key data-testid values verified: batch-detail-page, ph-badge, overall-pass-reject-bar, stage-card-{id}, rejection-summary-section, rej-metric-total, toggle-rejections, toggle-history, move-to-{id}, inspect-{id}, insp-submit-{id}. PhScale component removed and replaced with inline ph-badge. RejectionPanel and ActivityLog are extracted components on right side.

two_column_layout.details: Stages on left (lg:col-span-7), rejection panel + activity on right (lg:col-span-5)

ph_badge_inline.details: pH shown as inline badge next to batch code (not slider). pH 8.5 shows blue, pH 7.5 shows teal/sky color

info_cards_readable_numbers.details: Production Date, Total Crates (120), Bottles/Crate (24), Total Bottles (2,880), Unallocated (0) - all with text-base/text-lg sizes

summary_row.details: Unallocated (0 crates), Total Rejected (222 bottles with 7.7%), Warehouse Ready (120 bottles with 30 transferred)

quality_bar.details: Overall quality bar showing 92.3% pass (green) and 7.7% rej (red) with visual bar

stage_cards_monochrome_headers.details: QC Stage 1, QC Stage 2, Labeling, Final QC - all have monochrome headers (no colored backgrounds)

stage_cards_text_lg_numbers.details: Received (120), Pending (0), Passed (0/120), Rejected (55/46/49/72) - all readable text-lg

stage_cards_quality_microbar.details: Green/red micro-bar visible under each stage card when there are rejections

rejection_panel_right_side.details: By Resource (Surya Yadavalli - 222) and By Reason (Seal Defect - 222) breakdowns with progress bars

rejection_detail_view.details: Expandable with filters (Resource, Reason, Stage, Date) and table showing all rejection records

activity_log_collapsible.details: Shows Activity (8) with toggle, displays movement and inspection entries with timestamps

inspection_form_inline.details: Opens inline with Resource dropdown, Date picker, Crates Inspected input, Rejection Details (Count + Reason), Add Entry/Rejection buttons, Submit/Cancel

move_receive_form.details: Receive button visible on stages with available items, shows source label and available quantity

warehouse_transfer_section.details: Shows available bottles (90 bottles, 3 crates), Transfer to Master Warehouse button, transfer history table

ui_verification_screenshots: .screenshots/batch_detail_redesign_v2.png - Two-column layout, pH badge, quality bar, stage cards with percentages
.screenshots/inspection_form_v2_detail.png - Inline inspection form with entry card, rejection details
